scrapes.target_description: Coast to Coast AM - all years and episodes transcripts

validation.success_criteria: All retrievable transcripts downloaded; run stops when no new episodes found

scrapes.type: Wayback CDX query + forum archive harvesting

scrapes.target_description: Old games from Wayback, itch.io, Ludum Dare, GitHub. Legal assessment for copyright/fair use. DIGEST FILTERS FOR GREEN GAMES ONLY.
scrapes.provider: Wayback CDX API + itch.io + Ludum Dare + GitHub

validation.success_criteria: Crawler finds 100-300 games; Legal Agent assesses all; Digest filters to GREEN only; Email delivers conversion-ready games
validation.target_discovery_rate: 100-300 games per week (across 4 sources: Wayback, itch.io, Ludum Dare, GitHub)
validation.expected_green_rate: 40-60% of assessed games = 40-180 GREEN (conversion-ready) games per week
validation.recency_requirement: Weekly run; digest with GREEN games delivered by Sunday
